summary: Converted Path Map Chapter Archive from always-open deep dossier rendering into a compact level-cluster surface with explicit selected-chapter expansion and collapse.
changes: Added pathChapterArchiveExpandedByLane state and pathChapterArchiveExpanded helper.
Added renderPathChapterLevelClusters for horizontal chapter level selection.
Hid the old chapter-card grid and kept chapter focus through the new cluster rail.
Moved selected-chapter dossier rendering behind an explicit Expand selected chapter dossier action.
Kept Collapse dossier near the archive summary so expanded history can be closed without hunting down the page.

verification.pytest: 31 passed, 55 deselected with python -m pytest tests -q -k agent_company_atlas

next_visual_targets: Virtualize or cluster other long Path Map modules below the archive.
Add stronger generated art and motion polish to compact level clusters.
Persist per-lane preferred compact/expanded archive state if repeated operator use shows that is useful.
